name: Girlie Pops
overview:
Influencing is wild, dating is worse, and adulthood is a total scam. But these two? They’ve got each other.

Starring Devishi Madaan and Ankita Chhetri, this mini-series follows two best friends (and flatmates) as they navigate the chaos of content creation, the heartbreak of modern dating, and the quarter-life crises that hit every month-end. From getting "benched" in relationships to chasing forgotten dreams, this story celebrates the girls who hype each other up through the madness.
